title: 冲突处理层级 / Handling hierarchy
point: 客户利益优先;冲突先避免,不能避免则充分披露并妥善管理。 / Client first; avoid, else disclose fully and manage.
keyfacts: 避免 > 披露 > 管理 / Avoid > disclose > manage

title: 高佣金诱惑 / Commission temptation
point: 高佣金不等于可推荐不适合的产品;须推荐最符合需求者并披露冲突。 / High commission never justifies an unsuitable recommendation; recommend the best fit and disclose.
keyfacts: 隐瞒冲突属违规 / Concealing conflicts is a breach
